channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: How much can a Front-end Developer learn about Machine Learning using only JavaScript?
item.description: Robot Playing Piano by Franck V on Unsplash: https://unsplash.com/photos/U3sOwViXhkY Machine Learning and Artificial Intelligence have been huge buzzwords in the Tech industry for quite some time....

item.title: Como Testar Agentes de IA que Chamam suas APIs Sem Perder Dados
item.description: Um agente de codificação de IA executou um script, viu sucesso e, em seguida, uma tabela de banco de dados de produção desapareceu. O post-mortem no Hacker News viralizou com o título: “A IA não...

item.title: Understanding React Virtual DOM Internally
item.description: hey reader its me shivam and today i am all researching about DOM and how React works, why am i learning it, what benefit do i get after learning it so with this many thoughts i really got to know...

item.title: LLVM #3 — Control Flow
item.description: After all we've done (building a lexer, parser, code-generator, optimiser, and the JIT), we give Kaleidoscope decision-making abilities. What I built: Commit 5ba5803 What I understood:...

item.title: I Designed the AI Agent as a Runtime from Day One, Not as a Chat with Functions
item.description: At the end of January, I sat down, sketched out the Spectrion architecture in my head, and started writing code. From the outside, it could be described simply: An AI agent for iPhone that not...

item.title: Chrome’s AI features may be hogging 4GB of your computer storage
item.description: Google Chrome may be taking up more of your storage than expected thanks to a large on-device AI model file that, in some cases, is being automatically downloaded to the browser's system folders....

item.title: Database Which No-Code: The Honest Truth
item.description: In 2024, 68% of startups we surveyed replaced their initial PostgreSQL schema with a no-code database in the first 6 months of operation—only to migrate back 11 months later, losing an average of...

item.title: Introducing Kiwi Config: Simplifying Configuration Management in .NET Ecosystems
item.description: Introduction to Kiwi Config Kiwi Config (Kiwify.Kiwi.Configuration) is an attribute-driven configuration library for .NET. This article walks through every concept and feature with detailed...

item.title: Introducing Kiwi DI: Simplifying Dependency Injection in .NET Ecosystems
item.description: Introduction to Kiwi DI Kiwi DI (Kiwify.Kiwi.DependencyInjection) is an attribute-driven dependency injection framework for .NET. It moves service registration from startup code to the classes...

item.title: 2026: A virada tech que (talvez) chegue pra valer
item.description: E aí, gurizada! Aqui é o Marcelo Cabral. Dias atrás, eu gravei um vídeo pro meu canal (que você pode assistar no YouTube) com um título bem provocador: "Previsões de Tecnologia que Vão Virar Sua...

item.title: type vs interface in TypeScript - What You Really Need to Know
item.description: You've definitely come across this debate more than once: type or interface? Most answers online boil down to "it depends" or "use interface for objects, type for everything else." That's not...

item.title: Hasan Piker, Self-Described ‘Ayatollah of Woke,’ Wants AI to Die
item.description: The far-left Twitch streamer says AI is rotting our brains. He’s also addicted to Twitter and listens to at least eight podcasts.

item.title: Google's Android Apps Get Public Verification to Stop Supply Chain Attacks
item.description: Google has announced expanded Binary Transparency for Android as a way to safeguard the ecosystem from supply chain attacks. "This new public ledger ensures the Google apps on your device are...

item.title: Windows Phone Link Exploited by CloudZ RAT to Steal Credentials and OTPs
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed details of an intrusion that involved the use of a CloudZ remote access tool (RAT) and a previous undocumented plugin dubbed Pheno with the aim of...

item.title: Peter Sarlin’s QuTwo reaches $380M valuation in angel round
item.description: QyTw0, the Finnish AI lab founded by former AMD Silo AI CEO Peter Sarlin, is now valued at €325 million (approximately $380 million) after raising a €25 million angel round ($29 million). It's a...

item.title: Marc Lore says that AI will soon enable anyone open a restaurant
item.description: Wonder wants to turn its robotic kitchens into AI-powered “restaurant factories,” letting anyone spin up a virtual food brand with a prompt.

item.title: Palo Alto PAN-OS Flaw Under Active Exploitation Enables Remote Code Execution
item.description: Palo Alto Networks has released an advisory warning that a critical buffer overflow vulnerability in its PAN-OS software has been exploited in the wild. The vulnerability, tracked as...

item.title: Adding Benchmaxxer Repellant to the Open ASR Leaderboard
SAP bets $1.16B on 18-month-old German AI lab and says yes to NemoClaw
item.description: SAP plans to buy German AI startup Prior Labs and invest heavily in it. It is also prohibiting customers' agents use to a select few like Nvidia's NemoClaw.

item.title: ‘I Actually Thought He Was Going to Hit Me,’ OpenAI’s Greg Brockman Says of Elon Musk
item.description: OpenAI’s president wrapped his testimony on Tuesday by revealing a fiery meeting with Musk in 2017 and subsequent efforts to remove several board members.

item.title: Altara secures $7M to bridge the data gap that’s slowing down physical sciences
item.description: Altara’s AI aims to diagnose failures and help speed up R&D by unifying data siloed across spreadsheets and legacy systems.

item.title: Google Home’s Gemini AI can handle more complicated requests
item.description: Google Home users can now ask Gemini to complete more complex, multi-step tasks and combine multiple tasks in a single command. Google has updated Gemini for Home to Gemini 3.1, which it says will...

item.title: Apple agrees to pay iPhone owners $250 million for not delivering AI Siri
item.description: Apple has agreed to pay $250 million to settle a class action lawsuit that accused it of misleading customers about the availability of its Apple Intelligence features. The proposed settlement...

item.title: Apple plans to make iOS 27 a Choose Your Own Adventure of AI models
item.description: With Apple's latest operating system updates, users will reportedly have their pick of which third-party AI models they want to use for a host of tasks.

item.title: ASML CEO Christophe Fouquet on his company’s monopoly: no one is coming for us
item.description: Christophe Fouquet, who became ASML's CEO in 2024 after more than a decade at the company, sat down with this editor on the rooftop deck of his Beverly Hills hotel Tuesday morning ahead of his...

item.title: Microsoft gives up on Xbox Copilot AI
item.description: Xbox is "winding down Copilot on mobile" and "will stop development of Copilot on console," new Xbox CEO Asha Sharma announced on Tuesday. The move follows Sharma's reorganization of the Xbox...

item.title: Widely used Daemon Tools disk app backdoored in monthlong supply-chain attack
item.description: Daemon Tools users: It's time to check your machines for stealthy infections, stat.

item.title: Apple could let you pick a favorite AI model in iOS 27
item.description: The next update to Apple's operating systems could allow users to choose their preferred AI model for running Apple Intelligence. According to Bloomberg's Mark Gurman, Apple is planning to allow...

item.title: Threads is finally getting DMs on the web
item.description: Nearly a year after rolling out Threads direct messaging to everyone on mobile, Meta is finally bringing the feature to the web. Meta says it's "testing" DMs on the web now, but plans to make the...

item.title: Pennsylvania sues Character.AI after a chatbot allegedly posed as a doctor
item.description: According to Pennsylvania's filing, a Character.AI chatbot presented itself as a licensed psychiatrist during a state investigation, and also fabricated a serial number for its state medical license.
